name: t54 Labs
oneliner: Identity, verification, and compliance tools for AI agents, backed by Franklin Templeton and Ripple
finserv: Franklin Templeton and Ripple as investors signal deep finserv alignment; building compliance tooling specifically for AI agents in financial contexts
team: Founded Jan 2025; Franklin Templeton + Ripple backing implies strong finserv network
thesis: As AI agents begin transacting on behalf of humans in financial services, the identity and trust layer becomes critical infrastructure. t54 Labs is building exactly this — and their investor roster (Franklin Templeton, Ripple) signals that incumbents already see the need.
